title: Cushman & Wakefield India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Cushman & Wakefield India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
